! Title: ShieldNova - Services / Tiktok
! Description: Domain set for Tiktok traffic routing.

! Homepage: https://github.com/harryheros/shieldnova

! Profile: Conservative / Compatibility-First
! Built: 2026-04-28 00:14:00 UTC
! Total: 6
! Breakdown: service_rules=6

! TikTok (International)
! Purpose: service-specific routing for proxy tools.
! This is NOT a blocking list.

||tiktok.com^                             ! TikTok - main platform
||tiktokcdn.com^                          ! TikTok - CDN
||tiktokv.com^                            ! TikTok - video delivery
||musical.ly^                             ! TikTok - legacy domain
||isnssdk.com^                            ! TikTok - SDK domain
||byteoversea.com^                        ! ByteDance overseas infrastructure
